"CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-436", "name": "Interpretation Conflict"}], "description": "## Summary
Tlon Startup Migration Rehydrates Empty-Array Revocations From File Config

## Current Maintainer Triage
- Status: open
- Normalized severity: low
- Assessment: v2026.3.28 startup migration still treats empty-array settings as missing and can rehydrate revoked Tlon config from file state after restart.

## Affected Packages / Versions
- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Latest published npm version: `2026.3.31`
- Vulnerable version range: `<=2026.3.28`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.3.31`
- First stable tag containing the fix: `v2026.3.31`

## Fix Commit(s)
- `a4d72a83f01fedd35964c352e3473c7712a3511b` — 2026-03-31T14:57:03+01:00

## Release Process Note
- The fix is already present in released version `2026.3.31`.
- This draft looks ready for final maintainer disposition or publication, not additional code-fix work.

Thanks @smaeljaish771 for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00307, "percentile": 0.22519}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3pm9-5j7m-59vc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-03T03:20:16Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3pm9-5j7m-59vc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3pm9-5j7m-59vc"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41388"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-03T03:20:16Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-3pm9-5j7m-59vc", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/a4d72a83f01fedd35964c352e3473c7712a3511b", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases/tag/v2026.3.31", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3pm9-5j7m-59vc"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-3pm9-5j7m-59vc", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Tlon Startup Migration Rehydrates Empty-Array Revocations From File Config", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-28T18:19:10Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3pm9-5j7m-59vc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.31", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.3.28"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
